test_patterns_that_failed.description: Testing WebSocket message handling with perfect mocks
test_patterns_that_failed.gap_analysis: Mocks don't capture browser event timing and composition states

test_patterns_that_failed.description: Testing React component state management in isolation
test_patterns_that_failed.gap_analysis: Missing integration with actual DOM events and WebSocket timing

test_patterns_that_failed.description: Testing message ID generation and duplicate detection
test_patterns_that_failed.gap_analysis: Logic works but misses double newline injection in message flow

test_patterns_that_work.description: Full browser testing with real WebSocket connections
Combination of mocked units with real integration points

double_newline_injection.description: Multiple components add newlines causing duplicate command execution
double_newline_injection.prevention_pattern: Integration tests that verify complete message flow

event_handler_lifecycle_issues.description: WebSocket event handlers not properly cleaned up causing duplication
event_handler_lifecycle_issues.prevention_pattern: Component lifecycle tests with real WebSocket connections

browser_composition_event_conflicts.description: Browser composition events interfere with message sending logic
browser_composition_event_conflicts.prevention_pattern: Cross-browser testing with real keyboard events

recommended_tdd_enhancements.description: Add Playwright/Cypress tests that use real browsers with real WebSocket connections
recommended_tdd_enhancements.implementation: Create integration tests that simulate actual user typing and button clicks

recommended_tdd_enhancements.description: Keep unit tests for logic, add integration tests for user flows
recommended_tdd_enhancements.implementation: 70% unit tests (mocked), 25% integration tests (real), 5% e2e tests

recommended_tdd_enhancements.description: Test from user perspective, not just technical correctness
recommended_tdd_enhancements.implementation: Record user sessions, replay them in tests, validate UX metrics

recommended_tdd_enhancements.description: Test real network timing and async event handling
recommended_tdd_enhancements.implementation: Add artificial delays, test concurrent events, validate race conditions

high_risk_indicators: User reports 'still broken' after test passes
High mock coverage with low integration coverage
Perfect test isolation with real-world complexity
User symptom description doesn't match test scenarios
confidence_adjustment_rules: Reduce confidence by 50% when mock-to-real ratio > 80%
Increase confidence by 30% when user flows are tested end-to-end
Flag for manual review when user feedback contradicts test results
